claims.claim: SiliconFlow supports a reliable fixed-payload JSON-schema envelope for Qwen2.5-7B.
The tested 7B Planner structural routes are usable.
claims.caveat: System-level endpoint evidence; provider revision is undisclosed.

claims.claim: Automatic question-only span candidates meet the production gate.
claims.caveat: Gold annotation helper is algorithmic, not double-human reviewed.

claims.claim: Contract-matched Gold-query dense retrieval meets V2.3 thresholds.
The R0 Oracle downstream path is completely lossless.
claims.caveat: Refuted as a perfect/lossless claim: Answer Ready/EM is 50/60, while the weaker claim that the downstream path is partially usable remains supported.

claims.claim: Strictly independent internal holdouts are constructible under the fixed audit.
claims.caveat: Strict failure is bounded-search evidence; Compositional is feasible.

claims.claim: A stronger exact model would resolve the Planner boundary.
claims.caveat: No exact strong comparator was frozen or run.

belief_changes.from: Provider schema support may be the main blocker
belief_changes.to: Provider fixed schema support works; real-input decoding and semantics remain blockers

belief_changes.from: Retriever may dominate the end-to-end failure
belief_changes.to: Gold-query retriever passes; Planner/Span dominate current failure
No P1/P2 candidate is eligible; holdout remains unused
